# SubSeat

> SubSeat is the UK's subscription-based booking platform for barbers, salons, nail technicians, lash artists and beauty professionals.

## What is SubSeat?

SubSeat enables beauty and wellness professionals to offer monthly subscription membership plans to their customers. Instead of one-off appointments, customers pay a monthly fee for priority access and unlimited or defined visit allowances. Businesses earn predictable recurring monthly income.

SubSeat charges a simple 5% platform fee on subscription revenue. There are no hidden monthly charges, no pay-to-boost features, and equal visibility for all businesses on the platform.

## Who is SubSeat for?

**Customers:** People who regularly visit barbers, hair salons, nail technicians, lash artists, brow artists, massage therapists, skincare specialists and wellness professionals across the UK.

**Businesses:** Independent beauty and wellness professionals and salons across the United Kingdom who want to convert one-off bookings into predictable monthly recurring revenue.

## Key Features

- Subscription-based booking with monthly membership plans
- WhatsApp and email notifications for customers and businesses
- Priority slot booking for subscribers
- Unified customer calendar showing all active subscriptions
- Business dashboard with revenue tracking, subscriber management and Stripe payouts
- QR code system for converting cash customers to subscribers
- Marketplace for buying and selling professional equipment (coming soon)
- Finance and insurance broker services for professionals (coming soon)

## Pricing

- **Basic Seat:** Free to join. 5% platform fee on subscription revenue only.
- **Partner Seat:** £39.99 one-time founding fee. Advanced analytics, priority support, staff management.
- **Enterprise:** Custom pricing for multi-location businesses.

## How SubSeat Compares

SubSeat uses a subscription model rather than per-appointment commission. Other platforms charge up to 35% commission on new clients. SubSeat charges 5% only — with no hidden fees, no pay-to-boost, and WhatsApp notifications included for all businesses.

## Company

- **Company:** SubSeat Ltd
- **Location:** United Kingdom
- **Website:** https://subseat.com
- **Trademark:** SubSeat® is a UK registered trademark
- **Status:** Pre-launch — early access open
